Terms of Service

Last updated: July 6, 2026

Disclaimer: These terms are a template for informational purposes and do not constitute legal advice. Please consult a qualified attorney to ensure compliance with applicable laws.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using AI Tools Hub (aitools.dev), you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our website.

2. Use License

Permission is granted to temporarily access and read the materials on AI Tools Hub for personal, non-commercial use only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not:

  • Modify or copy the materials
  • Use the materials for any commercial purpose or for any public display
  • Attempt to reverse engineer any software contained on the website
  • Remove any copyright or other proprietary notations from the materials
  • Reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works from our content without explicit permission

3. Content Accuracy

The materials on AI Tools Hub are provided on an "as is" basis. While we strive for accuracy, we make no warranties, expressed or implied, regarding the completeness, accuracy, reliability, or availability of the information on our website.

Product prices, features, and availability are subject to change. We do our best to keep information current, but we recommend verifying details directly with the product's official website.

4. Affiliate Links

AI Tools Hub contains affiliate links. When you click these links and make a purchase, we may receive a commission. Our editorial opinions are not influenced by affiliate relationships. See our Affiliate Disclosure for full details.

5. Intellectual Property

All content published on AI Tools Hub, including text, graphics, logos, and images, is the property of AI Tools Hub and is protected by international copyright laws. You may not reproduce our content without written permission.

6. Limitation of Liability

In no event shall AI Tools Hub be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on our website, even if we have been notified orally or in writing of the possibility of such damage.

7. External Links

AI Tools Hub has not reviewed all of the sites linked to its website and is not responsible for the contents of any such linked site. The inclusion of any link does not imply endorsement by AI Tools Hub of the site.

8. Modifications

AI Tools Hub may revise these terms of service at any time without notice. By using this website, you agree to be bound by the current version of these terms of service.

9. Governing Law

These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with applicable laws. Any disputes relating to these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the applicable jurisdiction.

10. Contact Us

If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at hello@aitools.dev.

Affiliate Disclosure: AI Tools Hub is supported by our readers. Some links on this site are affiliate links, meaning we may earn a commission if you make a purchase through them — at no extra cost to you.
